race.comment: JOLSON AL (2) bumped into a big winner last start at Ascot when sitting handy over 1000m and finishing 2.3L away. Chris Parnham remains in the saddle and he looks to be trending the right way. Can build on the last start and make his presence felt. GUARANTOR (1) returned in good order first-up when finishing off nicely and the 1100m trip should suit him a bit better. This shapes nicely for him with that run under his belt and he won't be far away. BILLIE (6) will be fitter for the fresh run where she was beaten 2.4L at Ascot over this trip. She was placed second-up last campaign and Faithfull hops on board now replacing the apprentice hoop. Can turn in a better performance now. BONDI QUEEN (8) carries no weight here and makes some appeal first-up without a trial. WICKED RILEY (4) is worth including on debut.
